label: joy_wedding
text: She laughed and danced with pure joy, tears of happiness streaming down her face as she celebrated at the wedding reception.

label: fear_darkness
text: He froze in the doorway, heart hammering, as he heard footsteps creeping slowly through the pitch-black hallway toward him.

label: anger_injustice
text: She slammed her fist on the table, furious that they had once again dismissed her work without so much as reading it.

label: sadness_loss
text: He sat alone in the empty room, staring at the photograph, overwhelmed by grief for everything he had lost.

label: calm_nature
text: She sat quietly by the lake, breathing in the cool morning air, feeling a deep and settled sense of peace wash over her.

label: excitement_news
text: He could barely contain himself as he read the acceptance letter, jumping up and rushing to tell everyone the incredible news.
